fields.Title: Intro to Cloud Computing Workshop
fields.Description: Hands-on evening workshop covering the basics of cloud deployment, containers, and serverless functions. Open to all CS majors, no prior cloud experience required.

fields.Title: Software Engineering Intern - Summer Analytics Team
fields.Description: Paid summer internship building internal analytics tooling for a mid-size logistics company. Looking for rising juniors/seniors with Python experience.

fields.Title: Riverbend University Hackathon
fields.Description: 24-hour student hackathon with prizes for best overall hack, best beginner project, and best use of open data. Date TBD, pending venue confirmation.

fields.Title: Fall Career Fair
fields.Description: Annual career fair with employers from tech, finance, and consulting recruiting for internships and full-time roles. Business casual attire recommended.
